title: Sesame Blaze Chicken
description: A spicy chicken dish with a nutty sesame flavor.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt, black pepper, and solo.
Heat sesame oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken breast for 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes.
Meanwhile, mix soy sauce, honey, garlic, and ginger in a bowl.
Brush the sesame seeds onto the chicken breast during the last 5 minutes of baking.
Remove the chicken from the oven and brush with the soy sauce mixture.
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Serve immediately and garnish with additional sesame seeds if desired.
